# Implement Spec

Implement the active spec.

Before editing:

- Read `requirements.md`, `spec.md`, `plan.md`, and `tasks.md`.
- Check `git status --short`.
- Read the files named in the plan.

During implementation:

- Keep changes scoped to the spec.
- Update tests with behavior changes.
- Update docs when shipped behavior changes.
- Mark completed tasks in `tasks.md`.

After implementation:

- Run the validation commands named in the spec.
- Record any skipped validation and why.
